title: epipactis velutina
intro: Epipactis velutina, also known as the velvet helleborine, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Epipactis. It is native to various regions, including Asia and Europe, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to relieve colds, fever, and other respiratory issues. Epipactis velutina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of health benefits and medicinal uses.
